scratch.buffer:
; Scratch buffer for live sequencer scripting.
; C-x C-e eval s-expression at cursor
; C-x C-b eval whole buffer
; C-q quit scratch
; Examples:
;   (seq-track-steps)
;   (for-each |n| (seq-toggle-step n) (list 1 5 9 13))
;   (every :bar 2 '(seq-toggle-step 1))
;   (clear-hooks)

(seq-track-steps)

(def f1 () (
  let ((n (rand-int 8)))
    (range n (+ n 8))
  ))


(every :beat 3 |ctx| (for-each |z| 
  (do 
    (seq-plock-timebase z (if (< (rand-int 8) 4 ) :4t :64t ))
    (seq-set-transpose z (rand-int 30))
) (f1)))

(clear-hooks)
